fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger register.

fields.name: From Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first general ledger entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last general ledger entry number in the register.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the entries in the register were posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code for the entries in the register.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the batch name of the general journal that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: From VAT Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first VAT entry number in the register.

fields.name: To VAT Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last entry number in the register.

fields.name: Reversed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the register has been reversed (undone) from the Reverse Entries window.

fields.name: Creation Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the entries in the register were posted.
